data.title: KBRA issues ratings for CHASE 2026-CINV1, a RMBS with 713 mortgages worth $310.2 million, with investment properties (69.1%) & second homes (30.9%).
data.description: New York-based credit rating agency KBRA has allocated initial ratings to 94 classes of mortgage pass-through certificates issued by Chase Home Lending Mortgage Trust 2026-CINV1 (CHASE 2026-CINV1). This prime RMBS transaction involves 713 residential mortgages, totaling an approximate interest-bearing principal balance of $310.2 million as of the February 1, 2026 cut-off date. The mortgage pool is made up of loans backed by investment properties (69.1%) and second homes (30.9%).

data.title: Tradeweb invests $31M in crypto ECN Crossover Markets, partnering for institutional trading network integration with CROSSx platform.
data.description: Tradeweb's recent investment involves a significant partnership linking their institutional trading network with Crossover's CROSSx platform for spot crypto liquidity. This collaboration aims to enhance accessibility and efficiency in the digital asset market and is expected to revolutionize the trading experience for users. The partnership also indicates a promising growth opportunity for both companies, with the investment amounting to a substantial figure.

data.title: WISEcode™ launched Non-UPF Shield™ and Consumer App for food clarity at Expo West in Anaheim, California.
data.description: A new product called Non-UPF Shield™ has been launched by WISEcode™ at Expo West in Anaheim, California. This innovative shield aims to provide clarity on ultra-processed foods. In addition to the shield, WISEcode™ also introduced a new consumer app experience. This launch is part of the company's efforts to address the growing concern around ultra-processed foods and their impact on health. The debut of these products at Expo West highlights the importance of transparency in the food industry.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig advises Hilco Capital in purchasing and selling assets of Design Group Americas, a global manufacturer.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, the renowned law firm Greenberg Traurig, LLP provided counsel to Hilco Capital and its subsidiaries during the acquisition and selling process of the assets belonging to Design Group Americas, Inc. This company is a worldwide producer and distributor of items related to celebrations, stationery, creativity, and gifting.

data.title: Smithbucklin acquires McKinley Advisors to provide combined expertise for associations. Deal announced on March 4, 2026.
data.description: In a merger announcement, on March 4, 2026, Chicago and Washington-based firms Smithbucklin and McKinley Advisors are teaming up to provide enhanced services to their clients. Smithbucklin, a top professional services firm, has acquired McKinley Advisors, a prestigious association consultancy known for its excellence in the industry. This collaboration aims to address upcoming challenges, offering clients a stronger support system in navigating the evolving landscape.

data.title: Bitcoin price surges above $74,000 on Wednesday amid bullish trend. Will altcoins follow suit? #BTC #ETH #BNB #XRP #SOL #DOGE #ADA #BCH #HYPE #LINK
data.description: The cryptocurrency market witnessed a notable uptrend on Wednesday as Bitcoin surged past $74,000, benefitting from continuous investor interest in spot Bitcoin ETFs. This rally has spurred discussions on whether technical analysis backs the current surge in BTC and other alternative coins.

data.title: JustFoodForDogs launches 4 targeted nutrition diets for dogs, based on 10+ years of research, to address specific health needs. #PetHealth #Nutrition
data.description: A leading brand has launched 4 human-grade pet food recipes after over a decade of veterinary research. These recipes aim to cater to issues like sensitive stomachs, sensitive skin, weight management, and joint health. The company, based in Tustin, California, unveiled these new products on March 4, 2026. JustFoodForDogs is known for its innovative approach in providing high-quality pet nutrition.

data.title: Refresh emergency kits for spring storms, Ameren customers "spring forward" on March 8 for daylight saving time.
data.description: As spring storms approach, residents in St. Louis are being urged to update their home emergency kits. With daylight saving time on March 8, Ameren customers are reminded to not only adjust their clocks but also refresh their emergency supplies. This includes checking and changing smoke detector batteries. Keeping these kits up to date is crucial for safety during severe weather events. It is vital for residents to be prepared with essentials such as food, water, first aid supplies, and important documents. By ensuring their emergency kits are well-stocked, individuals can better protect themselves and their families during emergencies. Stay informed and stay safe.
